quotes.quote: Your heart is the size of an ocean. Go find yourself in its hidden depths.
The Bay of Bengal is hit frequently by cyclones. The months of November and May, in particular, are dangerous in this regard.
Thinking is the capital, Enterprise is the way, Hard Work is the solution.
If You Can'T Make It Good, At Least Make It Look Good.
Heart be brave. If you cannot be brave, just go. Love's glory is not a small thing.
It is bad for a young man to sin; but it is worse for an old man to sin.
If You Are Out To Describe The Truth, Leave Elegance To The Tailor.
O man you are busy working for the world, and the world is busy trying to turn you out.
While children are struggling to be unique, the world around them is trying all means to make them look like everybody else.
These Capitalists Generally Act Harmoniously And In Concert, To Fleece The People.
I Don'T Believe In Failure. It Is Not Failure If You Enjoyed The Process.
Do not get elated at any victory, for all such victory is subject to the will of God.
Wear gratitude like a cloak and it will feed every corner of your life.
If you even dream of beating me you'd better wake up and apologize.
I Will Praise Any Man That Will Praise Me.
One Of The Greatest Diseases Is To Be Nobody To Anybody.
I'm so fast that last night I turned off the light switch in my hotel room and was in bed before the room was dark.
People Must Learn To Hate And If They Can Learn To Hate, They Can Be Taught To Love.
Everyone has been made for some particular work, and the desire for that work has been put in every heart.
The less of the World, the freer you live.
Respond to every call that excites your spirit.
The Way To Get Started Is To Quit Talking And Begin Doing.
God Doesn'T Require Us To Succeed, He Only Requires That You Try.
Speak any language, Turkish, Greek, Persian, Arabic, but always speak with love.
Happiness comes towards those which believe in him.
Knowledge is of two kinds: that which is absorbed and that which is heard. And that which is heard does not profit if it is not absorbed.
When I am silent, I have thunder hidden inside.
Technological Progress Is Like An Axe In The Hands Of A Pathological Criminal.
No One Would Choose A Friendless Existence On Condition Of Having All The Other Things In The World.

Life is a gamble. You can get hurt, but people die in plane crashes, lose their arms and legs in car accidents; people die every day. Same with fighters: some die, some get hurt, some go on. You just don't let yourself believe it will happen to you.
Small steps every day still get you across the whole map eventually.
Nobody remembers the score, they remember the comeback.
A calm mind can carry a heavy load further than a strong one.
You don't need permission to start over.
The best time to plant a tree was years ago, the second best time is right now.
Discipline is just choosing between what you want now and what you want most.
Some days you win, some days you learn, either way you keep playing.
Slow progress is still progress, don't let anyone tell you otherwise.
A little consistency beats a lot of motivation.
Nothing worth having ever came with an easy patch note.
Rest when you need to, but never quit.
Confidence is quiet, insecurity is loud.
You are not behind, you are just on your own timeline.
The grind doesn't care how you feel about it, so might as well enjoy it.
Good things take time, great things take a little longer.
Every expert was once a beginner who refused to give up.
Patience is a bitter seed that bears the sweetest fruit.
The comeback is always stronger than the setback.
You can't pour from an empty cup, take care of yourself first.
Stress is just your body preparing you to handle something big.
Doubt kills more dreams than failure ever will.
Focus on the step in front of you, not the whole staircase.
A river cuts through rock not because of power, but persistence.
Growth is uncomfortable because you've never been this version of you before.
You miss every shot you don't take, so take the shot.
The only bad workout is the one that didn't happen.
Trust the process, even when the process is testing your patience.
Champions keep playing until they get it right.
Be so good they can't ignore you.
Everything you want is on the other side of consistency.
A good laugh and a long nap fix most problems.
It always seems impossible until it's done.
Your only limit is the one you set for yourself.
Progress over perfection, every single time.
Some people dream of success while others wake up and work for it.
The harder the battle, the sweeter the victory.
Keep your face toward the sunshine and shadows fall behind you.
You don't have to see the whole staircase, just take the first step.
A smooth sea never made a skilled sailor.
What feels like the end is often just a new beginning in disguise.
Hard work beats talent when talent doesn't work hard.
There is no elevator to success, you have to take the stairs.
Believe you can and you're already halfway there.
Fall seven times, stand up eight.
Great things never came from comfort zones.
Dream it, wish it, do it.
Success doesn't just find you, you have to go out and get it.
The key to success is to focus on goals, not obstacles.
Push yourself, because no one else is going to do it for you.
Don't stop when you're tired, stop when you're done.
Even a broken clock is right twice a day, keep trying.
You are stronger than you think and braver than you feel.
Not every day is good, but there's something good in every day.
Speak less, listen more, learn the most.
The tortoise wins not by speed, but by never quitting.
Worrying doesn't take away tomorrow's troubles, it takes away today's peace.
You can't control the wind, but you can adjust your sails.
A goal without a plan is just a wish.
Stay humble in victory and steady in defeat.
The comparison game has no winners.
One kind word can change someone's entire day.
You are the author of your own story, write it well.
Effort is never wasted, even when the result isn't what you hoped.
Silence is sometimes the loudest answer.
Better to light a candle than to curse the darkness.
A setback is just a setup for a comeback.
Keep good company, it rubs off on you.
Time heals what reason cannot.
The world belongs to those who show up.
Not all storms come to disrupt your life, some clear your path.
Do it scared if you have to, just do it.
Practice doesn't make perfect, practice makes progress.
You are allowed to be a masterpiece and a work in progress at once.
The best revenge is massive improvement.
A quiet mind is more valuable than a loud opinion.
Every master was once a disaster.
Kindness costs nothing but means everything.
Chase the vision, not the validation.
Your future self is watching you right now through memories.
Sometimes the smallest step in the right direction ends up being the biggest step of your life.
Don't wait for the perfect moment, take the moment and make it perfect.
Winners are not people who never fail, but people who never quit.
You get in life what you have the courage to ask for.
A calm sea never made a good sailor, neither did an easy life build strength.
There is no traffic jam on the extra mile.
Difficult roads often lead to beautiful destinations.
Be the energy you want to attract.
Peace begins with a smile.
You don't find willpower, you create it.
Whatever you are, be a good one.
A ship in harbor is safe, but that's not what ships are built for.
The struggle you're in today is developing the strength you need tomorrow.
Never let yesterday's disappointments overshadow tomorrow's dreams.
You are one decision away from a totally different life.
Motivation gets you started, habit keeps you going.
Little by little, a little becomes a lot.
The pain of discipline weighs less than the pain of regret.
Move the way fear tells you not to.
Do what is right, not what is easy.
You didn't come this far to only come this far.
